meaning: adj.能实行的,行得通的,可以实行的
examples: It offers practicable advice to businessmen.
Please weigh the above points and see if they are practicable.
It is not practicable to offer her the original job back.
Browsing hundreds of web pages from a mobile screen is not practicable or desirable.
He therefore believes that the only practicable day in this Parliament is January 1st 2004.
